text.title: Storybook Setup — Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules every storybook-setup application must obey.

rule.statement: Author stories with CSF3: const meta = { ... } satisfies Meta<typeof Component>; type Story = StoryObj<typeof meta>;
rule.rationale: satisfies preserves literal types so argTypes infer correctly; without it, args lose specificity.

rule.statement: Every story file includes tags: ['autodocs'] in its Meta.
rule.rationale: autodocs auto-generates the Docs page from args + argTypes — single source of truth, no MDX duplication.

rule.statement: Default story args provide every required prop; variants override only what differs.
rule.rationale: Stories without required props render warnings or crash; missing defaults break visual regression.

rule.statement: Global wrappers (Theme, Router, ReactQuery) live in .storybook/preview.ts, not in each story file.
rule.rationale: Per-story decorators duplicate setup and drift; global decorators stay one place.

rule.statement: Run Chromatic on every PR; gate merges on visual regression baseline.
rule.rationale: Visual regressions slip past unit tests and review eyes; Chromatic snapshots them deterministically.
